header.sylphioAlert:
Oops, not yet! 🙈

Sylphio, the wind spirit, is working hard on preparing for its debut.
It will bring some magical features soon, so please stay tuned! 🍃✨

footer.sloganKr: 발 아래 꽃, 먼 곳의 별
footer.sloganEn:
Flowers underfoot, stars in the distance.
To follow the distant stars, I hope you don't miss the beautiful flowers that bloomed under my feet now.

buildersLog.heroParagraph:
From a simple portfolio to a complete SaaS platform.
We share the record of our fierce journey of designing products and building code.
buildersLog.seoDescription: A tech blog recording PriSincera's product making and business building journey.

home.heroSubStrong: "Flowers at your feet, Stars in the distance"
home.heroSubText:
Moving toward a shining goal in the distance,
while remaining faithful to the essence blooming right before us.
We are certain that this is the most rightful path.
home.philosophyLead1:
Chasing a star in the distance,
we hope you do not miss the beautiful flower blooming at your feet.
home.philosophyLead2:
In a world of constant shifts in tasks and tools,
a solid attitude of immersing oneself in the present problem
ultimately completes the correct direction for the future.
home.philosophyLead3: The unchanging essence discovered in a 20-year journey,
home.philosophyDeclaration:
Prioritizing sincerity above all —
This is PriSincera.

conceptCard1.title: Attitude
conceptCard1.subtitle: Attitude
conceptCard1.desc: The power that sustained us for 20 years was not the tools, but a solid attitude toward our craft.

conceptCard2.title: Priority
conceptCard2.subtitle: Priority
conceptCard2.desc: Sorting and organizing the direction of the vision among countless tasks: that is priority.

conceptCard3.title: Sincerity
conceptCard3.subtitle: Sincera
conceptCard3.desc: Focusing transparently on the essence makes trust follow inevitably.

home.journeySubtitle:
20 years of IT experience meets AI technology,
born as a tool to help you grow.

milestone1.headline: Accumulation of Experience
milestone1.desc: From web planning to leading global services. Through countless projects, I learned the importance of "unchanging essence and attitude."

milestone2.headline: Encounter with AI
milestone2.desc: Technical barriers are collapsing. The owner's ownership meets AI, welcoming an era of makers who directly realize ideas in their heads.

milestone3.headline: A Tool Supporting Growth
milestone3.desc: Combining 20 years of experience with AI technology, now born as a practical web service that directly assists your daily life and growth.

home.servicesSubtitle: From planning to development, these are services built to assist users' real growth.
home.serviceBaseDesc:
A ultra-lightweight engineering core demonstrating the synergy between a planner's complete ownership and AI pair programming (Vibe Coding).
An integration of high-performance architecture combining a React/Vite client, zero-downtime serverless GCP Cloud Run containers, and multi-layered Firebase security infrastructure.
home.serviceBuildersDesc:
PriSincera's relentless development journey, designed with Vibe coding and GCP serverless.
We vividly share raw growth stories: challenging backend troubleshooting, AI pipeline expansions, security audits, and more.
home.serviceBuildersCta: 🚀 Read Development Journey & Engineering Growth Stories
home.serviceDailyDesc:
5 minutes a day, IT trend insights, AI prompts, and even business Japanese.
In the flood of information, we gather only the necessary signals and deliver them every morning.
home.serviceDailyCta: ✨ Free Subscription to Daily Digest in 5 Minutes
home.servicePaceDesc:
A micro action tracker that eases your anxiety and helps you build your own orbit.
Turn daily small insights into actionable tasks, and record steady growth.
home.servicePaceCta: ⛵ Log in in 3 Seconds & Create Your Orbit
home.serviceSylphioDesc:
An AI real-time translation app that captures all screen audio and microphone input in real-time, instantly rendering subtitles on-device.
Flawlessly experience the powerful multilingual intelligence of Gemini and GPT in a native Mac environment.
home.serviceSylphioCta: 🍃 Meet Sylphio, the Real-Time AI Translator
home.connectSubtitle:
Whether it's business, career, or about attitude —
feel free to connect.
home.seoDescription: PriSincera Official Website. Designing priorities with sincerity for complex business.
home.seoKeywords: PriSincera, Business, Strategy, Priority, Sincerity, IT Trends

dailyDigest.heroSubtitle:
Don't get lost in the flood of information.
Global trend curations, practical AI prompts,
and business languages delivered every morning. Don't let it just be read; make it your career weapon.
dailyDigest.subBtnSuccess: ✨ Your Daily Signal is ON: See you at 8:00 AM every morning with new updates!
dailyDigest.subBtnAlreadySubbed: ✨ See you at 8:00 AM every morning with new updates!
dailyDigest.subBtnFreeSub: ✨ Free Subscription to Daily Digest in 5 Minutes
dailyDigest.subError: Oops, an error occurred during subscription. Please try again.
dailyDigest.noQuickPeekData: No detailed summary available for this date.
dailyDigest.chronoCalendarDesc: Hover over active calendar dates (Ambient Glow) to quickly scan that day's key digest briefing via Quick Peek.
dailyDigest.noDataForDate: No data available for this date.
dailyDigest.unsubConfirm:
Are you sure you want to unsubscribe?
You will miss out on daily 5-minute signals for your growth. 😢

(To continue receiving them, please click 'Cancel')
dailyDigest.unsubSuccess: Successfully unsubscribed. You are welcome to return anytime!
dailyDigest.tabTechSignalsDesc: We summarize today's top 3 curated trend news from global IT media.
dailyDigest.tabLangDojoDesc: One sentence that becomes your weapon for global communication
dailyDigest.introSection1Desc:
AI monitors over 35 global IT/business media in real-time every day.
We score the most important articles based on practical relevance and impact, delivering a 3-line summary you can grasp in 1 minute on a busy morning.
dailyDigest.introSection2Title:
Don't just read it.
Prompts you can copy and paste
dailyDigest.introSection2Desc: To apply today's trend news immediately to your work, we provide a copy-and-paste AI prompt template with optimized parameters.
dailyDigest.introSection3Title:
One sentence that becomes
your global business weapon
dailyDigest.introSection3Desc: Just one sentence a day, dense business language. It sharpens your global communication skills through local nuances and native TTS voice.
dailyDigest.introPipelineStep1Desc: Collect the latest articles from highly reliable global sources every dawn
dailyDigest.introPipelineStep2Desc: Remove noise and select core signals (★) based on practical impact
dailyDigest.introPipelineStep3Desc: Combine selected information with AI prompts and language content to publish automatically

paceNote.heroSubtitle:
Don't just read and pass by.
Turn your daily insights into practical tasks and put them on your own pace to record your growth log.
Without getting swept away by others' speeds, and keeping your own rhythm and direction.
paceNote.createMyPace: ✨ Log in in 3 Seconds and Create Your Orbit
paceNote.loggedCheer: ⛵ Wishing you a steady and unwavering voyage!
paceNote.loadError: An error occurred while loading data.
paceNote.currPaceDesc: Your configured small action orbits (execution) and weekly deep reflections (retrospective) combine to form your precious AI growth portfolio.
paceNote.pastPaceDesc: Your steady execution orbits and reflections recorded in the past.
paceNote.omnibarPlaceholder: Enter a new goal or explore AI-recommended orbits...
paceNote.retrospectWritePlaceholder: Feel free to write down your contemplations, difficulties, and lessons from this week's orbits. (Max 1000 characters)
paceNote.retrospectReadPlaceholder: Log in in 3 seconds to complete your own weekly retrospective that is saved in real-time.
paceNote.noRetrospectRecorded: ⛵ There is no recorded contemplation log for this week.
paceNote.exportModalDesc: Your quietly built action orbits and deep reflection logs have been compiled into a beautiful markdown document. Copy and paste it onto LinkedIn, GitHub README, Notion, or your personal blog to use as your unique branding asset.
paceNote.loginToRecord: Please log in first to record your own orbit.
paceNote.addDirectlyDesc: Create a new orbit with the entered content.
